briefs.user_prompt: hey, can you write me a meta ad for prosody — prosodylang.com. it's a free ios app with a brand new approach to language learning. instead of grammar drills or flashcards, you listen to the rhythm of real native speech and mimic it back. that's the whole loop — listen, mimic, repeat — and it's what gets you speaking with confidence. nine languages: french, german, spanish, turkish, japanese, chinese, arabic, italian, portuguese. short sessions. ai can also generate a personalized mini-course on the spot for a specific situation like a job interview or ordering food abroad.
